content:
Hey folks,

Once more around the sun, today is 14 years since Lobsters launched in 2012.

Like the the American fourteeners, our activity charts have been busily sloping upwards.
We now have 20,412 users who've submitted 127,589 stories, written 696,054 comments, and cast 4,911,743 votes.
(I'm happy to run more complicated queries than count(*).)

Previously:
2013
2016
2017
2019
2020
2021
2022
2023
2024
2025

Look back at the last year’s top stories,
or review your upvoted comments
and stories to share your favorites.
